hooks.command: branch=$(git -C "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo unknown); be_count=$(grep -cE "^\s*(GROUP|PRIVATE|ONLINE|TRIAL|BUSINESS|TOEIC|OTHER)\s*=" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend/app/domain/entities/contact.py" 2>/dev/null || echo ?); fe_count=$(grep -cE "'(group|private|online|trial|business|toeic|other)'" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/shared/types/contact.ts" 2>/dev/null || echo ?); printf 'repo: kz-bz-english2 | branch: %s | LessonType drift backend:%s vs shared:%s | uv for backend (pip forbidden)\n' "$branch" "$be_count" "$fe_count"

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); first=$(printf '%s' "$cmd" | awk '{print $1, $2; exit}'); case "$first" in 'git commit'*|'git tag'*|'git log'*|'git show'*) exit 0 ;; esac; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(pip|pip3)[[:space:]]+(install|uninstall)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"Use uv (uv add / uv sync) instead of pip per CLAUDE.md"}'; exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*find[[:space:]]+/[^[:space:]/]'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"find must be rooted at ./ not / — scanning the whole disk is wasteful"}'; exit 0; fi; if printf '%s' "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[;&|]|&&|\|\|)[[:space:]]*(black|flake8|isort)([[:space:]]|$)'; then printf '{"decision":"block","reason":"ruff covers Black/isort/flake8 — do not run them separately"}'; exit 0; fi; exit 0

p=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); case "$p" in *.py) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/backend" && uv run ruff format "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1; uv run ruff check --fix "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json) (cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && npx --no-install prettier --write "$p" >/dev/null 2>&1) || true ;; esac; exit 0
printf 'Before claiming done: npm run ci:local (or /verify)\n'
